creator: driesm@freebsd.org
text:
I'm getting errors in the emby log though:

2022-01-28 09:39:18.491 Error ImageProcessor: Error enhancing image
	*** Error Report ***
	Version: 4.6.7.0
	Command line: /usr/local/lib/emby-server/system/EmbyServer.exe -os freebsd -ffdetect /usr/local/lib/emby-server/bin/ffdetect -ffmpeg /usr/local/lib/emby-server/bin/ffmpeg -ffprobe /usr/local/lib/emby-server/bin/ffprobe -programdata /var/db/emby-server
	Operating system: Unix 13.0.0.0 
	Framework: Mono: 6.8.0.123 (tarball Sun Dec 26 14:50:53 UTC 2021)
	OS/Process: X64/X64
	Runtime: usr/local/lib/mono/4.5/mscorlib.dll
	Processor count: 8
	Data path: /var/db/emby-server
	Application path: /usr/local/lib/emby-server/system
	System.EntryPointNotFoundException: System.EntryPointNotFoundException: PixelSetOpacity assembly:<unknown assembly> type:<unknown type> member:(null)
	  at (wrapper managed-to-native) ImageMagickSharp.PixelWandInterop.PixelSetOpacity(intptr,double)
	  at ImageMagickSharp.PixelWand.set_Opacity (System.Double value) [0x00006] in <7d06cd6eeef24f6882217376dbf98586>:0 
	  at ImageMagickSharp.PixelWand..ctor (System.String color, System.Double opacity) [0x0000d] in <7d06cd6eeef24f6882217376dbf98586>:0 
	  at CoverArt.ImageMagick.CAHelper.GetNewTransparentImage (System.Int32 width, System.Int32 height) [0x00000] in <2a15ec86921045b5819dca3d4da419bc>:0 
	  at CoverArt.ImageMagick.CoverArtBaseEnhancer.EnhanceImage (ImageMagickSharp.MagickWand originalImage, CoverArt.Entities.ProfileDefinition profile, System.String itemType, System.String frameType, MediaBrowser.Controller.Entities.BaseItem item, System.Collections.Generic.List`1[T] childImages) [0x00463] in <2a15ec86921045b5819dca3d4da419bc>:0 
	  at CoverArt.ImageMagick.CoverArtAlbumEnhancer.EnhanceImageAsyncInternal (MediaBrowser.Controller.Entities.BaseItem item, ImageMagickSharp.MagickWand originalImage, MediaBrowser.Model.Entities.ImageType imageType, System.Int32 imageIndex) [0x00030] in <2a15ec86921045b5819dca3d4da419bc>:0 
	  at CoverArt.ImageMagick.CoverArtBaseEnhancer.EnhanceImageAsync (MediaBrowser.Controller.Entities.BaseItem item, System.String inputPath, System.String outputPath, MediaBrowser.Model.Entities.ImageType imageType, System.Int32 imageIndex) [0x00007] in <2a15ec86921045b5819dca3d4da419bc>:0 
	  at CoverArt.Enhancers.CoverArtBaseEnhancer.EnhanceImageAsync (MediaBrowser.Controller.Entities.BaseItem item, System.String inputFile, System.String outputFile, MediaBrowser.Model.Entities.ImageType imageType, System.Int32 imageIndex) [0x00015] in <2a15ec86921045b5819dca3d4da419bc>:0 
	  at Emby.Drawing.ImageProcessor.ExecuteImageEnhancers (System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1[T] imageEnhancers, System.String inputPath, System.String outputPath, MediaBrowser.Controller.Entities.BaseItem item, MediaBrowser.Model.Entities.ImageType imageType, System.Int32 imageIndex) [0x0002f] in <9609c9b8b4a7434c8a22ca70d481a75f>:0 
	  at Emby.Drawing.ImageProcessor.GetEnhancedImageInternal (System.String originalImagePath, MediaBrowser.Controller.Entities.BaseItem item, MediaBrowser.Model.Entities.ImageType imageType, System.Int32 imageIndex, MediaBrowser.Controller.Providers.IImageEnhancer[] supportedEnhancers, System.String cacheGuid, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken) [0x00204] in <9609c9b8b4a7434c8a22ca70d481a75f>:0 
	  at Emby.Drawing.ImageProcessor.GetEnhancedImage (MediaBrowser.Controller.Entities.ItemImageInfo image, System.Boolean inputImageSupportsTransparency, MediaBrowser.Controller.Entities.BaseItem item, System.Int32 imageIndex, MediaBrowser.Controller.Providers.IImageEnhancer[] enhancers, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken) [0x000df] in <9609c9b8b4a7434c8a22ca70d481a75f>:0 
	Source: mscorlib
	TargetSite: Void Throw()

I don't thing the interface between ImageMagick 6 and 7 is compatible.
